gmail_label_query_note: Use label:Avaris (display name) in Gmail search_threads queries, not label:Label_1 (the ID) — the ID form returns zero results even though list_labels reports it correctly.
notes: gmail_cursor is the timestamp of the newest alert email processed so far; each daily run should only consider messages newer than this, then advance it. nextyn and ungm added 2026-07-19 after being spotted as new registrations in the inbox; not yet confirmed as gig-producing sources.
